products.name: IPUServices
products.tagline: Composable accelerator and service orchestration stack.
products.summary: A modular platform for orchestration, feature serving, sidecar extensions, and hardware-accelerated workflows.
products.details:
IPUServices is a composable platform for integrating accelerator-aware services with practical operational tooling. It combines service orchestration, feature pipelines, and extension points so teams can evolve workloads without rebuilding infrastructure from scratch.

The project is built to support iterative experimentation and production handoff, with strong emphasis on modular deployment boundaries, contract-driven interfaces, and scalable runtime behavior.

products.name: AutoML Canvas
products.tagline: Visual experiment design and model flow tooling.
products.summary: Canvas-based authoring for experiment configuration, model workflows, and reproducible iterative runs.
products.details:
AutoML Canvas provides a visual workspace for building and refining experiment pipelines through an interactive node-and-canvas experience. It is intended to make experimentation more transparent, reproducible, and collaboration-friendly.

The project focuses on fast iteration loops: users can compare configurations, track flow changes, and move from exploratory setup to repeatable execution with minimal friction.

products.name: Query Accelerator Service
products.summary: Runtime service focused on high-throughput query handling and integration with accelerator-oriented execution plans.
products.details:
Query Accelerator Service is designed for latency-sensitive query paths where throughput and predictable response times are both critical. It provides runtime components that can route, optimize, and execute requests with accelerator-aware planning.

The service emphasizes integration flexibility so that data products and upstream clients can adopt performance improvements incrementally while keeping clear operational observability boundaries.

products.name: HyperSwarm
products.tagline: Adaptive multi-swarm orchestration for advanced optimization workflows.
products.summary: A research project focused on high-scale swarm coordination, dynamic strategy selection, and accelerator-aware scheduling.
products.details:
HyperSwarm explores coordinated multi-swarm optimization for large search spaces where single-strategy methods can stall or overfit local structures. It combines adaptive strategy switching, shared state hints, and staged exploration/exploitation policies.

The project is aimed at workloads that benefit from distributed search intelligence and hardware-aware scheduling, with practical emphasis on measurable convergence behavior and robust tuning under changing constraints.

products.name: PoplarCppApiWrapper
products.tagline: C++ integration layer for Poplar-oriented accelerator workflows.
products.summary: A C++ wrapper and interop surface for connecting Poplar-based compute graphs to service-facing orchestration paths.
products.details:
PoplarCppApiWrapper provides a focused C++ API layer intended to simplify integration of Poplar-centric workloads into broader service architectures. It supports practical interop and deployment patterns where accelerator kernels, runtime coordination, and host-side orchestration need to work together cleanly.

The project is designed for teams that want repeatable integration points between C++ accelerator code and higher-level platform services without over-coupling runtime boundaries.

products.name: SQL-IPU Bridge
products.tagline: Hybrid SQL acceleration bridge with microservice and SQL Server CLR execution paths.
products.summary: A dual-path SQL integration stack offering both microservice-based offload and SQLServerCLR in-database acceleration adapters.
products.details:
SQL-IPU Bridge provides two deployment modes for SQL workloads: a microservice architecture for decoupled orchestration and a SQLServerCLR path for in-engine integration where appropriate. This allows teams to select integration boundaries based on governance, latency targets, and operational controls.

The project focuses on practical SQL acceleration adoption by combining familiar database workflows with IPU-aware execution strategies.

products.name: PostGresIPUQueryAccelerator
products.tagline: PostgreSQL-oriented query acceleration for high-throughput analytical paths.
products.summary: A PostgreSQL integration project for IPU-assisted query planning and execution on latency-sensitive and throughput-heavy workloads.
products.details:
PostGresIPUQueryAccelerator explores PostgreSQL query acceleration through IPU-aware planning and selective execution offload. It is designed to fit into existing PostgreSQL-centered data architectures while incrementally introducing acceleration features.

The project emphasizes clear observability and staged adoption so teams can evaluate performance gains without disruptive migration requirements.

products.name: SNN with Brain Model
products.tagline: Interactive spiking neural simulation with large-scale neuron control on consumer hardware.
products.summary: An SNN and brain-model project supporting user perturbation control over more than 16,000 individual neurons and seizure scenario simulation with propagation modeling.
products.details:
SNN with Brain Model is an interactive simulation environment for spiking neural network research and experimentation. It is built to operate on consumer hardware while exposing fine-grained control over more than 16,000 individual neurons, including direct user perturbation workflows for controlled experiments.

The project also includes seizure scenario simulation capabilities with propagation modeling to support repeatable study of dynamic network behavior under varying perturbation patterns. Intended for research and educational workflows.

portfolio.name: LevelZero.NET
portfolio.tagline: Managed .NET wrapper for Intel Level Zero GPU compute.
portfolio.summary: Open-source GPU compute wrapper with .NET APIs and SPIR-V kernel integration patterns.

portfolio.name: Interactive Probabilistic Neural Network Decision Matrix
portfolio.tagline: Interactive probabilistic model visualization in HTML/CSS/JavaScript.
portfolio.summary: Free interactive decision matrix demo project suitable for browser-based experimentation.

portfolio.name: Copilot Instructions Initiated Workflows
portfolio.summary: Public PowerShell workflow examples for instruction-driven development automation.
